contents:
Instance decide_eqb `{DecidablePaths A} : Eqb A
  := fun a b => if decide_rel paths a b then true else false.

Lemma decide_eqb_ok@{i} {A:Type@{i} } `{DecidablePaths A} :
  forall a b, iff@{Set i i} (eqb a b = true) (a = b).

goals.conclusion: forall a b : A, (a =? b) = true <-> a = b
forall a b : A, (a =? b) = true <-> a = b

forall a b : A,
(if decide_rel paths a b then true else false) = true <-> a = b

contents: intros a b;destruct (decide_rel paths a b) as [E1|E1];split;intros E2;auto.
change ((fun r => match r with LT => Unit | _ => Empty end) EQ).

goals.conclusion:
(fun r : comparison => match r with
                       | LT => Unit
                       | _ => Empty
                       end) EQ

contents: change ((fun r => match r with LT => Unit | _ => Empty end) GT).

goals.conclusion:
(fun r : comparison => match r with
                       | LT => Unit
                       | _ => Empty
                       end) GT

contents: change ((fun r => match r with EQ => Unit | _ => Empty end) GT).

goals.conclusion:
(fun r : comparison => match r with
                       | EQ => Unit
                       | _ => Empty
                       end) GT

contents:
Instance compare_eqb `{Compare A} : Eqb A | 2 := fun a b =>
  match a ?= b with
  | EQ => true
  | _ => false
  end.
Lemma compare_eqb_eq `{Compare A} : forall a b : A, a =? b = true -> a ?= b = EQ.

goals.conclusion: forall a b : A, (a =? b) = true -> (a ?= b) = EQ
forall a b : A, (a =? b) = true -> (a ?= b) = EQ

forall a b : A,
match a ?= b with
| EQ => true
| _ => false
end = true -> (a ?= b) = EQ

match a ?= b with
| EQ => true
| _ => false
end = true -> (a ?= b) = EQ

contents:
Instance tricho_compare `{Trichotomy A R} : Compare A | 2
  := fun a b =>
  match trichotomy R a b with
  | inl _ => LT
  | inr (inl _) => EQ
  | inr (inr _) => GT
  end.

Lemma tricho_compare_eq `{Trichotomy A R}
  : forall a b : A, compare a b = EQ -> a = b.

goals.conclusion: forall a b : A, (a ?= b) = EQ -> a = b
forall a b : A, (a ?= b) = EQ -> a = b

forall a b : A,
match trichotomy R a b with
| inl _ => LT
| inr (inl _) => EQ
| inr (inr _) => GT
end = EQ -> a = b

contents: intros a b;destruct (trichotomy R a b) as [E|[E|E]];auto.

Lemma tricho_compare_ok `{Trichotomy A R} `{Irreflexive A R}
  : forall a b : A, compare a b = EQ <-> a = b.

goals.conclusion: forall a b : A, (a ?= b) = EQ <-> a = b
forall a b : A, (a ?= b) = EQ <-> a = b

forall a b : A,
match trichotomy R a b with
| inl _ => LT
| inr (inl _) => EQ
| inr (inr _) => GT
end = EQ <-> a = b

contents: intros a b;destruct (trichotomy R a b) as [E1|[E1|E1]];split;auto.

Lemma total_abs_either `{Abs A} `{!TotalRelation le}
  : forall x : A, (0 <= x /\ abs x = x) |_| (x <= 0 /\ abs x = - x).

goals.conclusion: forall x : A, (0 ≤ x) * (abs x = x) + (x ≤ 0) * (abs x = - x)
forall x : A, (0 ≤ x) * (abs x = x) + (x ≤ 0) * (abs x = - x)
